original_snippet_context: An article discussing the Convênio de Taubaté and its implications for the Brazilian economy, focusing on the coffee industry and proposed measures.
relevant_quote: Excluese desta approvação a cláusula referente á «caixa de emissão ouro e conversão, cuja creação fica dependente de resolução do Congresso Nacional.
justification: This statement simply reports that the creation of the "caixa de emissão ouro e conversão" is excluded from the current approval and remains dependent on a separate decision by Congress. It doesn't offer any judgment or opinion on the Caixa itself.
